workflow_runs.display_title: test: add e2e tests for GTC acceptance dialog [HDX-5925] (#6296)

head_commit.message:
test: add e2e tests for GTC acceptance dialog [HDX-5925] (#6296)

HDX-5925


Adds end-to-end tests for the GTC (General Terms & Conditions) acceptance dialog, verifying that logged-in users see the dialog, can accept it, and that the acceptance persists across page reloads.

## Test cases

- Dialog visibility and content for users who haven't accepted
- Papermark document link with correct href and target
- Dialog dismissal on acceptance
- Persistence of acceptance across page reloads
- Root org users not seeing the dialog
- No dialog shown when no GTC versions exist
